subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all attributes, manifestations and revelations, befitteth the Ancient Lord, Who by His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از شئونات و ظهورات و بروزات امم مالک قدم را لایق و سزاست که باسم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
